name: sop
description: Standard operating procedure skills for repeatable engineering workflows, including GitLab merge request submission.

interface.longDescription: SOP collects standard operating procedure skills for repeatable engineering tasks. The first workflow creates GitLab merge requests by resolving branches, checking prerequisites, summarizing changes, pushing the branch, and opening the MR with glab.
defaultPrompt: Use submit-mr to open a GitLab merge request
Create an MR for the current branch
